component.name: Page tabs
component.description: Three-segment pill control (345×44.5): track `Foundation/Surface/Subtle`, `Spacing/4` inset; each segment `Typography/LABEL`, `Spacing/12` vertical padding, pill radius. Active segment `Foundation/Surface/Default` + `Foundation/Text/Primary`; inactive `Foundation/Surface/Subtle` (flush with track) + `Foundation/Text/Secondary`. Center column always carries light elevation shadow per file.

variants.Job Left | Middle | Right: Preset copy All / Open / Paid with selection on first, second, or third tab.
variants.Earnings Left | Middle | Right: Preset copy This week / This month / This year.

notes: 2026-04-10: Added kebab-case `page-tabs-*` structural hooks in TSX and spec.
2026-04-10: Component remains token-driven; no layout or shadow change was needed for the structure pass.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `806:20` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Each variant’s three segments renamed from mixed `page-tabs-tab-N-label` / `Button` to `page-tabs-tab-0` | `page-tabs-tab-1` | `page-tabs-tab-2` with TEXT layers `page-tabs-tab-0-label` … `page-tabs-tab-2-label` (matches `PageTabs.tsx`). Variant master node names (`page-tabs-tab-0`…`tab-5`) unchanged—organizational only. No `flatten()` in automation.
